prevalence.source: ECDC and WHO Europe enteric disease context
prevalence.trend: stable; seasonal peaks in winter and summer

incidence.source: ECDC surveillance and community cohort syntheses

burden.dalyPerCapita: low to moderate; higher in young children and older adults

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis; stool testing for outbreaks, severe disease, or vulnerable patients

publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Millions of episodes annually across EU
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with ORS and supportive care

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care and public health labs for outbreak confirmation
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: ORS, antiemetics, IV fluids for severe dehydration; targeted antibiotics when indicated
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Outbreak control in institutions and foodborne events
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong surveillance systems and access to supportive care
